query: Humane AI Pin user data deletion deadline February 2025 photo export transfer instructions official

{"query":"Humane AI Pin user data deletion deadline February 2025 photo export transfer instructions official","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1820,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnet.com/tech/computing/humane-ai-pins-will-stop-working-at-the-end-of-this-week/","title":"Humane AI Pins Will Stop Working at the End of This Week - CNET","content":"Your data will be deleted on Feb."},{"url":"https://www.designboom.com/technology/humane-ai-pin-debut-wearable-screenless-smartphone-flash-apps-hands-11-09-2023/","title":"humane AI pin shuts down and discontinues all its features","content":"UPDATE (February 19th, 2025): Humane AI Pin announces it is shutting down and discontinuing all of its features, including calling, messaging, AI queries and responses, and cloud access.
In a company note, the team says that every Humane AI Pin will officially stop working or operating starting February 28th, 2025, at 12pm PST.
All users are encouraged to sync their stored pictures, videos, and notes before the date. ‘If you do not do this, your data will be lost upon deletion,’ the company writes.
Humane AI Pin’s steel-like casing might recall Apple’s iPhones with its singular block and reflective surface.
Both Imran Chaudhri and co-founder Bethany Bongiorno worked for Apple."},{"url":"https://mashable.com/article/humane-ai-pin-discontinued-killed","title":"Humane has killed its Ai Pin less than a year after its release | Mashable","content":"In a post to Humane's support website, the company announced that all of its Ai Pins will stop working in just 10 days.
All Ai Pins will stop connecting to Humane's servers on Feb.
28, and all customer data will be permanently deleted as well, with users instructed to download anything they don't want to lose before then.
This help is temporary though, as customer support for the Ai Pin will also be discontinued on Feb.
Once the Ai Pins stop working, Humane advises customers to dispose of them via an e-waste recycling program.
"Humane’s AI platform Cosmos, backed by an incredible group of engineers, will help us create an intelligent ecosystem across all HP devices from AI PCs to smart printers and connected conference rooms," HP's President of Technology and Innovation Tuan Tran said in a statement.
2023, the Ai Pin aimed to supplant users' smartphones, and could perform functions such as taking photos, answering questions, and sending messages.
That isn't even to mention the problems with the Ai Pin's charging case, which was found to be a fire safety risk in June.
Humane reportedly began searching for a buyer within mere weeks of shipping the Ai Pin, aiming to sell for $750 million to $1 billion."},{"url":"https://www.biometricupdate.com/202502/humane-is-bricking-ai-pins-following-116m-hp-buyout","title":"Humane is bricking AI Pins following $116M HP buyout | Biometric Update","content":"Humane is bricking AI Pins following $116M HP buyout
According to Humane’s FAQ page, “all customer data, including personal identifiable information (PII), will be permanently deleted from Humane’s servers,” while users can download their data before the shutdown date.
After the February 28 deadline all stored data will be deleted, according to the company."},{"url":"https://the-decoder.com/humane-ends-its-ai-pin-in-ten-days-sells-technology-to-hp-for-116-million/","title":"Humane ends its AI pin in ten days, sells technology to HP for $116 million","content":"After just a few months on the market, AI hardware startup Humane is discontinuing its wearable AI Pin and selling its core technology to HP.
According to a customer letter dated February 18, all AI Pin devices will shut down permanently on February 28, 2025, at 9 p.m.
After this deadline, users will lose access to every feature - including calls, messages, AI queries, and cloud storage.
The company strongly urges customers to download any stored data before the cutoff date, as all remaining information will be permanently deleted once the servers go offline.
The AI Pin launched in April 2024 with considerable fanfare following its late 2023 unveiling."}]}
